templates.title: Runway Fashion Show with Dynamic Camera Movements
templates.description: Cinematic runway show capturing model struts, fabric flow, and fashion details with professional lighting

prompt.main: Professional fashion runway show. Model confidently walking down illuminated catwalk, designer clothing flowing with each step. Dynamic camera captures full-body shots transitioning to close-ups of fabric texture, stitching details, and accessories. Spotlights follow model creating dramatic shadows. Audience silhouettes frame the scene. Slow-motion moments highlight fabric movement and model's poise.

elements.cameraMovement: Dolly tracking alongside runway, crane shots overhead, smooth transitions between wide establishing shots and extreme close-ups on details
elements.subject: Professional fashion model in haute couture, confident walk, expressive poses at runway end
elements.scene: High-end fashion runway with LED strip lighting, minimalist backdrop, seated audience in shadows
elements.motion: Model's rhythmic catwalk, fabric billowing, hair movement, spotlight tracking, audience applause
elements.lighting: Dramatic runway spotlights, LED floor strips, rim lighting on model, soft fill for fabric details
elements.atmosphere: Exclusive, high-fashion, electric energy, anticipation, glamorous
elements.style: Fashion Week documentary meets Vogue editorial, high contrast, sharp focus on subject

modifiedElements.scene: Behind-the-scenes chaos, makeup stations, wardrobe changes
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Handheld documentary style, quick pans, following action

modifiedElements.lighting: Neon colors, projection mapping on runway

bestPractices: Capture both wide runway shots and detailed close-ups
Use variable frame rates for dramatic slow-motion fabric shots
Ensure model's face is well-lit during close-ups
Include audience reactions for atmosphere

examples.sampleOutput: Professional fashion show footage suitable for brand campaigns and editorial use

templates.title: Beauty Product Close-ups with Texture Details
templates.description: Macro cinematography showcasing beauty products with emphasis on textures, colors, and luxurious details

prompt.main: Extreme close-up beauty product shot. Lipstick bullet rotating slowly, revealing creamy texture and rich pigment. Light reflects off metallic packaging creating elegant highlights. Background defocused with bokeh. Product emerges from shadows into key light. Macro lens captures every detail - embossed logos, product texture, color payoff on skin.

elements.cameraMovement: Slow circular dolly around product, macro slider for push-ins, focus pulls between product and application
elements.subject: Luxury beauty products - lipsticks, foundations, eyeshadow palettes, skincare jars, perfume bottles
elements.scene: Minimalist studio setup with reflective surfaces, marble or acrylic backgrounds, color-coordinated props
elements.motion: Product rotation on turntable, liquid foundation drops, powder particles floating, brush strokes
elements.lighting: Soft box key light, accent lights for packaging shine, colored gels matching product theme
elements.style: High-end beauty commercial, product photography in motion, glossy magazine aesthetic

modifiedElements.subject: Natural ingredients like rose petals, gold flakes, botanical extracts
modifiedElements.motion: Ingredients falling into product, mixing, dissolving

modifiedElements.subject: Product being applied - foundation blending, lipstick gliding
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Extreme macro on skin texture during application
modifiedElements.lighting: Ring light for even skin illumination

bestPractices: Use macro lenses for extreme detail
Control reflections on glossy packaging
Show product texture through lighting
Include brand elements subtly

examples.sampleOutput: Luxury beauty product video for e-commerce and social media

templates.title: Makeup Application Sequences
templates.description: Step-by-step makeup transformation captured with professional techniques and cinematic flair

prompt.main: Professional makeup application sequence. Split-screen showing bare face transforming with each product. Brushes gliding across skin in slow motion, powder particles suspended in air. Extreme close-ups of eye makeup application - liner precision, lash separation, blend transitions. Time-lapse overall transformation intercut with real-time technique details.

elements.cameraMovement: Locked-off for time-lapse, handheld macro for details, slider movements for product reveals
elements.subject: Makeup artist hands, model's face, professional brushes and tools, product collection
elements.scene: Professional makeup station with ring light, organized products, clean aesthetic
elements.motion: Brush strokes, blending motions, product application, model's subtle expressions
elements.lighting: Ring light for even face lighting, accent lights for products, soft key light for atmosphere
elements.style: YouTube beauty guru meets high-end tutorial, clean and modern

modifiedElements.subject: Minimal makeup, skin-focused routine
modifiedElements.lighting: Natural window light, golden hour warmth

modifiedElements.subject: Avant-garde makeup, bold colors, artistic application
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Dynamic angles, Dutch tilts, extreme close-ups

bestPractices: Ensure consistent lighting throughout sequence
Capture both wide face shots and macro details
Show product names/shades clearly
Include before/after comparisons

examples.sampleOutput: Professional makeup tutorial video for brands and influencers

templates.title: Fashion Transformation Time-lapses
templates.description: Dynamic outfit changes and style transformations captured in creative time-lapse sequences

prompt.main: Fashion transformation time-lapse. Model in center frame, outfit changes in rapid succession creating visual rhythm. Each look perfectly styled - casual to formal, day to night. Background morphs with outfit themes. Accessories fly in and position themselves. Hair and makeup subtly evolve. Final reveal with full spin showcasing complete transformation.

elements.cameraMovement: Locked-off camera for time-lapse stability, final circular dolly for reveal
elements.subject: Fashion model, multiple outfits from different style categories, coordinated accessories
elements.scene: Neutral studio with modular backgrounds, color-changing LED panels
elements.motion: Quick outfit changes, accessories floating into place, fabric settling, model poses
elements.lighting: Consistent base lighting with color temperature shifts matching outfit moods
elements.style: Music video aesthetics meets fashion lookbook, rhythmic editing

modifiedElements.subject: Outfits transitioning through seasons
modifiedElements.scene: Background elements changing - leaves, snow, flowers
modifiedElements.atmosphere: Seasonal moods from fresh spring to cozy winter

modifiedElements.subject: Fashion evolution through decades - 50s to present
modifiedElements.style: Period-appropriate filming techniques for each era
modifiedElements.motion: Hair and makeup transforming with fashion

bestPractices: Maintain consistent model position
Use markers for precise positioning
Plan outfit order for visual flow
Sync changes to music beat if applicable

examples.sampleOutput: Dynamic fashion transformation video for social media and campaigns

templates.title: Jewelry Sparkle and Reflection Shots
templates.description: Luxurious jewelry cinematography emphasizing brilliance, craftsmanship, and precious details

prompt.main: Luxury jewelry piece under precise lighting. Diamonds catching light creating prismatic rainbows. Camera slowly reveals intricate metalwork, stone settings, and design details. Piece rotating on invisible turntable, each angle revealing new brilliance. Reflection in polished surface doubles visual impact. Subtle hand model interaction showing scale and wearability.

elements.cameraMovement: Macro slider approaches, 360-degree turntable rotation, probe lens through ring bands
elements.subject: Fine jewelry - rings, necklaces, earrings, watches, bracelets with precious stones
elements.scene: Black velvet backdrop, mirrored surfaces, gradient backgrounds, luxury display cases
elements.motion: Slow rotation, light play across surfaces, sparkle effects, chain movement
elements.lighting: Multiple small LED sources for sparkle, key light for form, rim lighting for definition
elements.style: High-end jewelry advertising, Tiffany & Co. aesthetic, museum-quality presentation

modifiedElements.subject: Jewelry worn by model in elegant setting
modifiedElements.scene: Luxury hotel, gala event, romantic dinner
modifiedElements.cameraMovement: Focus pulls between jewelry and wearer's expression

modifiedElements.subject: Jewelry creation process - sketching, casting, setting stones
modifiedElements.motion: Craftsman's hands at work, tools in action

bestPractices: Use multiple light sources for maximum sparkle
Clean jewelry thoroughly before shooting
Capture at high frame rate for smooth motion
Include both static beauty shots and movement

examples.sampleOutput: Luxury jewelry video for high-end marketing

templates.title: Hair Styling Motion Captures
templates.description: Dynamic hair movement and styling transformation showcasing techniques and final results

prompt.main: Professional hair styling sequence. Flowing hair in slow motion, each strand visible. Styling tools in action - blow dryer creating movement, curling iron forming perfect spirals, straightener gliding through sections. Transformation from wet to styled. Multiple angles capture volume, shine, and texture. Final reveal with dramatic hair flip or wind machine effect.

elements.cameraMovement: Orbiting around subject, vertical crane for length reveal, macro on texture details
elements.subject: Professional hair model, various hair types and lengths, styling tools and products
elements.scene: Modern salon setup or minimalist studio, clean backgrounds to emphasize hair
elements.motion: Hair flowing, tools moving through hair, product application, model head movements
elements.lighting: Rim lighting for hair separation, key light for shine, fill to show texture
elements.style: Hair commercial meets editorial beauty, emphasis on movement and shine

modifiedElements.subject: Hair color change process - application to final result
modifiedElements.motion: Color being applied, processing time-lapse, reveal

modifiedElements.subject: Embracing natural hair textures - curls, coils, waves

bestPractices: Use high frame rate for smooth slow motion
Ensure proper backlighting for hair definition
Show both process and final results
Capture movement to show hair health and body

examples.sampleOutput: Professional hair styling video for salons and product brands

templates.title: Model Portfolio Video Styles
templates.description: Professional model showcase featuring various looks, poses, and movements for portfolio presentation

prompt.main: Model portfolio montage showcasing versatility. Multiple looks - commercial smile, high fashion intensity, editorial storytelling. Smooth transitions between poses. Walking shots, profile turns, expression changes. Mix of color and black-and-white. Natural movements interspersed with strong poses. Eyes connecting with camera. Professional presence throughout.

elements.cameraMovement: Combination of static beauty shots, dolly push-ins, handheld movement shots
elements.subject: Professional model in various outfits and styles, from casual to haute couture
elements.scene: Multiple locations - studio, urban environment, natural settings
elements.motion: Pose transitions, walking, hair movement, fabric flow, natural gestures
elements.lighting: Variety - studio strobes, natural light, golden hour, dramatic shadows
elements.style: Agency portfolio meets editorial spread, clean and impactful

modifiedElements.subject: Relatable scenarios - coffee shop, shopping, fitness

bestPractices: Show range of expressions and poses
Include both motion and static shots
Demonstrate versatility in style
Keep transitions smooth and professional

examples.sampleOutput: Professional model portfolio video for agencies

templates.title: Behind-the-Scenes Fashion Shoots
templates.description: Documentary-style coverage of fashion photo shoots showing the creative process and energy

prompt.main: Behind-the-scenes fashion shoot energy. Photographer directing, model posing, stylists adjusting. Quick cuts between preparation and final shots. Makeup touch-ups, wardrobe adjustments, lighting setup. Candid moments of laughter mixed with intense concentration. Team collaboration visible. Final images appearing on camera screen intercut with live action.

elements.cameraMovement: Handheld documentary style, quick pans between action, over-shoulder of photographer
elements.subject: Fashion team - photographer, model, stylist, makeup artist, assistants
elements.scene: Photo studio with equipment, racks of clothing, makeup stations, set pieces
elements.motion: Constant activity - people moving, clothes being adjusted, equipment repositioning
elements.lighting: Available light from photo shoot, practical sources, run-and-gun style
elements.atmosphere: Creative energy, collaborative, fast-paced, professional excitement
elements.style: Documentary meets fashion film, authentic and aspirational

modifiedElements.scene: Outdoor location - beach, city streets, desert

modifiedElements.subject: A-list talent, larger crew, security presence

bestPractices: Capture authentic moments between poses
Show the full team and their roles
Include equipment and setup details
Mix wide shots with intimate moments

examples.sampleOutput: Engaging BTS content for fashion brands and magazines

templates.title: Beauty Routine Lifestyle Videos
templates.description: Aspirational lifestyle content showing beauty routines in realistic, relatable settings

prompt.main: Morning beauty routine in luxurious bathroom setting. Natural light streaming through windows. Model applying skincare with mindful movements. Products arranged aesthetically on marble countertop. Interspersed lifestyle moments - sipping tea, checking phone, selecting outfit. Real-time application mixed with time-lapse segments. Authentic yet aspirational atmosphere.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth handheld for intimacy, sliders for product reveals, static for time-lapses
elements.subject: Relatable model in comfortable loungewear, premium beauty products, lifestyle accessories
elements.scene: Beautiful bathroom or bedroom vanity area, natural home environment
elements.motion: Product application, daily routine activities, natural movements
elements.lighting: Natural window light, supplemented with soft LED panels, golden hour warmth
elements.atmosphere: Calm, aspirational, self-care focused, authentic luxury
elements.style: Lifestyle vlog meets high-end beauty content, Instagram aesthetic

modifiedElements.lighting: Warm lamp light, candles, cozy atmosphere
modifiedElements.subject: Removal routine, treatment masks, preparation for sleep

modifiedElements.motion: Full transformation from bare face to ready
modifiedElements.scene: Including outfit selection, full styling process

bestPractices: Keep lighting natural and flattering
Show real texture and application
Include lifestyle elements beyond just products
Maintain authentic yet aspirational balance

examples.sampleOutput: Lifestyle beauty content for brands and influencers

templates.title: Fashion Brand Story Cinematics
templates.description: Narrative-driven fashion films that tell brand stories through cinematic visuals and emotion

prompt.main: Cinematic fashion brand narrative. Model as protagonist moving through curated environments. Each scene reflects brand values - craftsmanship close-ups, heritage locations, modern innovation. Emotional storytelling through glances, movements, interactions. Wardrobe pieces featured naturally within story. Color grading enhances brand identity. Music and visuals create cohesive brand world.

elements.cameraMovement: Cinematic techniques - steadicam follows, crane establishing shots, intimate handheld moments
elements.subject: Brand ambassador/model, signature pieces, brand artifacts, locations tied to brand story
elements.scene: Multiple locations reflecting brand identity - ateliers, cities, nature, architectural spaces
elements.motion: Purposeful movement through spaces, interaction with environment, emotional gestures
elements.lighting: Cinematic lighting - motivated by story, brand colors, emotional tone
elements.atmosphere: Brand-specific - heritage, innovation, rebellion, elegance, sustainability
elements.style: Short film meets fashion advertisement, narrative-driven, emotionally resonant

modifiedElements.style: Documentary elements mixed with fashion film

modifiedElements.scene: Modern architecture, tech elements, urban futures

bestPractices: Develop clear narrative arc
Ensure brand values are visually represented
Use location and props to support story
Create emotional connection beyond just clothing

examples.sampleOutput: Cinematic brand film for major fashion campaigns
